text:
nothing i do it ./configure --prefix=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd  --config-dir=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd --enable-kqueue --disable-interactive  --module-dir=/usr/local/libexec/inspircd/modules  --binary-dir=bin --with-cc=c++ --log-dir=INSPIRCD_LOGDIR  --data-dir= --uid=INSPIRCD_UID --enable-gnutls --enable-geoip

and i get that
An error occured when executing: c++ -o modules/m_geoip.so -pipe -fPIC -DPIC -pedantic -Woverloaded-virtual -Wshadow -Wformat=2 -Wmissing-format-attribute -Wall -O2 -Iinclude -DMODNAME=m_geoip.so -fPIC -shared -rdynamic /usr/home/asher/inspircd-2.0.24/src/modules/m_geoip.cpp -lGeoIP
